error_message: Direct baseline pre-flight: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct weights = 14.96 GiB (cached safetensors), available RAM = 1.52 GiB. Naive load would need ~14.96 GiB contiguous, exceeding the 90 % headroom. On Windows the OS kills such allocations at signal level (exit 139) before Python can catch. AirLLM (T-3.1) rescues via per-layer mmap streaming.
